name: The Savage Heart
description:
The Savage Heart

*{Lore The Savage Heart is the truth behind the green veil: nature not as garden, but as gullet. It is the claw that tears, the fang that crushes, the hunger that stalks without malice and kills without mercy. Its followers are the druids you do not meet by firelight --- those who have learned that the forest feeds on its own, that the strong devour the weak, and that the only law is the one written in blood on snow.

Across the known world, the Savage Heart wears the face of the apex predator. In the Amaranthine core, it is the Great Bear, patient and unstoppable, a wall of fur and fury. Among the Ykrul and Kuvani, it is the Wolf of the Steppe, a pack hunter with tireless stamina. In Oshiira, it is the Golden Lion, whose roar shatters the hunt's silence. In Sekogo, it is the Leopard of the Tall Grass, a shadow that strikes once and is gone. In Dhahara, it is the Tiger of the Mangroves, whose amber gaze promises a death that runs faster than you can flee. Wherever prey fears the dark, the Savage Heart is already there, waiting.

quote "The deer does not weep for the wolf. The sapling does not beg the axe. In the red maw, there is no cruelty --- only truth. The truth that all flesh feeds the earth, and the earth feeds the strong." quote

*{Domain Focus itemize Apex Predation: hunting, stalking, dominating the food chain Red Tooth: killing as nature's sacrament, strength proven through violence Scavenger's Wisdom: using death for growth, nothing wasted Territory and Pack: dominance over a domain, leadership of the hunt itemize

*{Thiasos and Codex (Runekeeper Options)

A Runekeeper sworn to the Savage Heart does not bind a familiar of hearth and home. Their Thiasos is a small predator or hunting companion: a wolf pup with eyes the color of amber, a lynx kitten whose fur prickles at danger, a hawk with one white feather that never misses its mark, a viper that coils around the wrist and tastes the air for fear, or a shadow-fox that follows silently and leaves no tracks. This creature requires no food in the usual sense, but it must hunt and kill its own prey each week (a rat, a rabbit, or larger, depending on the keeper's means). If neglected, it becomes Compromised (it grows listless, and its keeper loses the benefit of Stalker's Instinct until the creature is fed with a fresh kill).

The Codex of the Savage Heart is never a book of paper and ink. It may be a belt of predator teeth, each tooth carved with a hunting verse; a bundle of cured hides painted with the kill-records of the keeper's lineage; a set of bone tally sticks, notched for every successful hunt; or the skull of a great beast, its jaw etched with runes that can only be read by the light of a fresh kill. Because the hunt resists being fixed in writing, the Codex requires upkeep: the Runekeeper must spend an hour each week oiling the leather, sharpening the teeth, or adding a new notch for a recent kill; otherwise the Rites stored there fade (treat as Compromised until the keeper makes an offering of fresh blood).

*{Patron's Gift (Imbuement)

Once per scene as an action, a Runekeeper of the Savage Heart may touch a held item (weapon, tool, or piece of armor) and whisper a hunter's promise. For the rest of the scene, the item grants +1 die to Athletics or Stealth rolls when in natural terrain, and the first time each scene the bearer would be knocked prone, they may ignore it (the hunter's stance is sure). After the scene, the user marks +1 Obligation to the Savage Heart.
summary: The Savage Heart *{Lore The Savage Heart is the truth behind the green veil: nature not as garden, but as gullet. It is the claw that tears, the fang that crushes, the hunger that stalks without malice and kills without mercy.

rites.name: Rite of the Predator's Gaze
rites.description: (Basic, 4 XP) Scene; Near; No. Tags: , , Materials: A tooth from a predator that killed its own prey. Effect: Mark a single target as your prey. Gain +1 die on all rolls to track, pursue, or intimidate that target. The effect lasts until the target escapes or is killed. Push It: The prey feels your gaze; they suffer --1 die to resist social pressure from you. Mark 1 SB (Spades). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Mark a single target as your prey. Gain +1 die on all rolls to track, pursue, or intimidate that target. The effect lasts until the target escapes or is killed. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Blood Scent
rites.description: (Basic, 5 XP) Scene; Self; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: A fresh kill's blood smeared on your face. Effect: You scent the air like a beast. Gain +2 dice to Investigation or Survival when tracking by smell. You may also detect fear --- you sense if a creature within Near is Frightened. Push It: Your sense expands to Far, but you are overwhelmed by the smell of blood; mark 1 SB (Hearts) and suffer --1 die to social rolls until the end of the scene. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: You scent the air like a beast. Gain +2 dice to Investigation or Survival when tracking by smell. You may also detect fear --- you sense if a creature within Near is Frightened. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Shifting Shape
rites.description:
(Advanced, 8 XP) Scene; Self; Yes. Tags: , Materials: A pelt or mask from the beast whose form you take. Effect: Assume the form of a predator for the scene. Choose one:

Bear (Tank Form) itemize Passive: +1 Armor, +2 dice to Body rolls. Guardian's Pounce: Once per scene, when you protect an ally, you may also knock the attacker prone (Body+Resolve DV 3 or fall). Limitation: Movement reduced by one band (cannot Dash). itemize

Feline or Canine (Striker Form) itemize Passive: +2 dice to Agility and Stealth, +1 band to movement (can Dash as a free action once per scene). Ambush Predator: When attacking from stealth, gain +1 Effect and ignore 1 point of the target's Armor. Limitation: --1 Armor (or +1 Harm taken). itemize

Cultural variations: Bear/Wolf (north), Lion/Leopard (Oshiira), Tiger/Panther (Dhahara). You may speak but cannot use tools or cast other Rites while transformed.

Push It: Shift as a free action once this scene, but mark 1 SB (Clubs) as the beast presses against your mind. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Assume the form of a predator for the scene. Choose one: Bear (Tank Form) itemize Passive: +1 Armor, +2 dice to Body rolls. Guardian's Pounce: Once per scene, when you protect an ally, you may also knock the attacker prone (Body+Resolve DV 3 or fall). Limitation: Movement reduced by one band (cannot Dash). itemize Feline or Canine (Striker Form) itemize Passive: +2 dice to Agility and Stealth, +1 band to movement (can Dash as a free action once per scene). Ambush Predator: When attacking from stealth, gain +1 Effect and ignore 1 point of the target's Armor. Limitation: --1 Armor (or +1 Harm taken). itemize Cultural variations: Bear/Wolf (north), Lion/Leopard (Oshiira), Tiger/Panther (Dhahara). You may speak but cannot use tools or cast other Rites while transformed.

rites.name: Rite of the Pack Hunt
rites.description: (Advanced, 7 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: A token from each member of your pack (a claw, a feather, a scrap of hide). Effect: You and up to three allies form a hunting pack. While within Near of each other, all gain +1 die to attacks against a single designated prey, and the first ally to attack each round gains +1 Effect. Push It: Coordination extends to Far, but hunters become territorial; mark 1 SB (Spades) as rivalries flare. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: You and up to three allies form a hunting pack. While within Near of each other, all gain +1 die to attacks against a single designated prey, and the first ally to attack each round gains +1 Effect. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Carrion Feast
rites.description: (Advanced, 9 XP) Scene; Touch; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: The flesh of a fallen enemy, consumed raw. Effect: Devour the strength of the fallen. Heal 1 Fatigue immediately, and gain +1 die to your next physical action. If the enemy was supernatural (spirit, demon, fey), you also gain a minor property of theirs for one scene. Push It: Heal 1 Harm instead of Fatigue, but mark 1 SB (Hearts) as the feast attracts scavengers. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Instant.
rites.effect: Devour the strength of the fallen. Heal 1 Fatigue immediately, and gain +1 die to your next physical action. If the enemy was supernatural (spirit, demon, fey), you also gain a minor property of theirs for one scene. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Final Hunt
rites.description: (Master, 14 XP) Extended; Near; No. Tags: , , , Materials: The heart of a predator you have killed in single combat, still warm. Effect: You become the ultimate hunter for one scene: itemize Ignore all difficult terrain. Gain +3 dice to tracking and combat rolls against your designated prey. If you reduce a prey to 0 Harm, make a free attack against another target within Near. itemize Push It: The hunt consumes you --- you cannot end the rite until all designated prey are dead or fled, and you suffer Harm 1 (Weariness) when the scene ends. Mark +2 Obligation. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: You become the ultimate hunter for one scene: itemize Ignore all difficult terrain. Gain +3 dice to tracking and combat rolls against your designated prey. If you reduce a prey to 0 Harm, make a free attack against another target within Near. itemize
